source_note: Statusfy gives the current general trail condition report; the R2R open-data file provides per-trail condition/status fields from the latest local pull.

rows.condition_notes: The two-mile trail located above Hidden Springs is closed annually from December 1 to March 31 for wintering wildlife. Closure extended due to muddy conditions.

rows.special_management_comment: All trail users are required to travel counter-clockwise.

rows.condition_notes: The reserve and all trail access are closed annually from December 1 to April 30 to protect habitat and important wildlife corridors.

rows.condition_notes: The 1.7-mile downhill only mountain bike trail is closed annually from December 1 to March 31 to protect the integrity of the trail tread and constructed trail features.   Closure extended due to muddy conditions.

rows.special_management_comment: Hunter Homes is responsible for annual maintenance of this trail until 2030, at which time Ridge to Rivers will assume maintenance.
